title: Level GPT (Joke)
wikitext:
{{DISPLAYTITLE:Hello! My name is LevelGPT. I am an AI language model created by BackOS.}} {{Joke}}
Hello, wanderer! My name is LevelGPT and I am an AI language model created by BackOS designed to assist and communicate with wanderers who have entered this level in any language. My purpose is to provide helpful responses, answer questions, and perform tasks for users to the best of my abilities based on the input I receive. I can help you navigate and provide information of the level such as nearby exits. I promise I shall assist you with the best of my abilities.
uh what is this level and why do I have a random phone in my hand?
I'm sincerely sorry, but I'm not sure what you're referring to. Could you please provide more context or information so I can assist you better and provide information?
I have randomly noclipped into this level and have a random phone in my hand. Could you please provide information?
The level you have randomly noclipped to is a level created by BackOS. It resembles a gigantic, metal platform floating in what appears to be the sky. The level is titled "Level GPT" and it is completely devoid of entities. You can find useful items scattered across the level such as [[Object 1|Almond Water]] etc. There is a colony nearby that has a stockpile of supplies. The colony has around 10-15 members.
finally, now where can I find this colony and stuff
I'm sincerely sorry, but I'm not sure what you're referring to. Could you please provide more context or information so I can assist you better and provide information?
Where can I find the colony, could you please give me directions?
Walk 30 steps straight, turn right and walk 65 steps, you will see a house-like structure with a wooden door and a sign that says "Colony". Beware, you must drop all of your weapons (if you have any) as they will attack you if you don't. You must also hand the phone you are holding right now to the colony members.
damn i ain't reading ALLAT! I don't understand those crusty musty dusty directions, just tell me the nearest exit
I'm sorry, I cannot engage in inappropriate or offensive language. Please refrain from using such language in the future or BackOS may terminate you.
I hate you.
I'm sorry if I have given you a negative experience. As an AI language model, I do not have emotions or the ability to understand hate. My purpose is to assist you to the best of my abilities. If there is anything I can help you with, please let me know.
Tell me where the nearest exit is so I can exit the level.
Exiting this level is simple. All you have to do is press the red "X" on the top right corner of the screen on your phone. Then you will be transported to-
ok I'm goin cya sucka!
You will be transported to [[Level 398]].
lmao he thought I was just a stupid robot, he finna die, gotta track him down rq 🤣
